comment:
staged.zig — Staged explain pipeline for `guidance explain`.

 Implements the hybrid vector + keyword search pipeline for the explain
 subcommand. The key exported functions are:

   executeStaged()   — search → collect Stage slices
   expandFollowUps() — follow see_also / skill refs → more stages
   formatStaged()    — render []Stage to markdown output

members.name: formatStaged: empty stages output contains header
formatStaged: code stage with line emits source path and line number
formatStaged: code stage without line still emits code block
formatStaged: summary appears before code sections
formatStaged: followup keywords produce Suggested Queries section
formatStaged: skill_doc stage produces Knowledge Base section
formatStaged: metadata stage with keywords prefix produces References section
parseSkillDocContent: YAML front matter with description returns description
parseSkillDocContent: YAML front matter without description returns first non-empty body line
parseSkillDocContent: no front matter returns first paragraph up to blank line
formatStaged: capability_doc stage renders Capability section
formatStaged: See Also is capped at 10 unique keywords
